text: Fact: The bank offers free online banking services to all account holders, including fund transfers, bill payments, and account statements.
Fact: To reset your internet banking password, visit the nearest branch with your CNIC or call our helpline at 111-000-123.
Fact: Lost or stolen debit cards can be blocked instantly through the mobile app or by calling the 24/7 helpline.
Fact: The bank charges zero fee for inter-bank fund transfers (IBFT) up to Rs. 25,000 per month for all digital channels.
Fact: A new savings account can be opened with a minimum deposit of Rs. 1,000 and a valid CNIC.
